battlePolicy.temporaryTestSwitch: Segnare questa battle come vinta o persa?

coordinatePolicy.note: Exact event trigger coordinates must wait for runtime coordinate verification, including the suspected east/south +30 offset between debug/in-game coordinate systems.

sourceEvidence: sceneggiatura: afternoon heat pressure about -2 comfort per minute
sceneggiatura: mosquito pressure must be spatialized through the visible mosquito cloud sprite instead of a passive night timer
sceneggiatura/GDD: GD shower recovery, hub tier mitigation, refrigerator, reflective tarp, wheelbarrow fatigue
V341 design refinement: rain produces wetness/energy pressure, storm produces orientation/stress pressure, and preparation/resilience is the second counter for counterplay

hazardRulesV341.heat: clear/sunny weather only; cloudy, rain, and storm must not behave like heat
hazardRulesV341.mosquito: requires active visible mosquito sprite proximity/chase/bite; no generic night decay
hazardRulesV341.rain: raises wetness and drains energy/preparation; recover through hub/shower/poncho-style effects
hazardRulesV341.storm: raises wetness, reduces orientation, increases stress, and drains energy/preparation; recover through hub/compass/kit-style effects
hazardRulesV341.bonuses: hub tier, reflective tarp, repellent, fridge, poncho, and compass-style flags reduce specific hazards instead of globally flattening all danger

comfortGameplayPolicyV341.runtimeContract: V341 mirrors numeric comfort/stress/energy thresholds into legacy flags for current event compatibility while keeping prep/wetness/orientation session-only; production should migrate battle/event effects to numeric deltas after save/load contract.

noParadoxChecks: Imperio must be present at reception during intro.
Intro text may be rewritten only if it preserves debt, missing wallet, wheelbarrow, and ghiaione scandal setup.
Comic intro integration remains later than core runtime.
events.sourceRationale: Intro debt/reception beat is directly represented by the supplied storyboard and scenario premise.

noParadoxChecks: Rent pressure must warn before punishment.
No eviction softlock without recovery path.
events.sourceRationale: Daily rent/debt pressure is an explicit gameplay-system requirement.

storyBeats: at least 3 recruited and resistance organized

noParadoxChecks: Resource spawn density must be capped.
Wheelbarrow capacity must gate collection without softlock.
events.sourceRationale: Resource collection is an explicit core management-loop requirement.

noParadoxChecks: Hub tiers are mutually exclusive visual states.
Recruited jobs unlock only after won branches.
events.sourceRationale: Hub/base upgrade loop is an explicit management-loop requirement.
Scenario section 3.3 defines a modular hub cutscene when any three workers are active on the Tabellone della Resistenza.

trigger.activeWorkerSlotPolicy: show exactly three assigned/recruited workers from the hub roster, not every unlocked worker

noParadoxChecks: Do not show all unlocked workers; runtime must filter exactly three active Tabellone slots.
The cutscene must not collect daily income twice or mutate recruitment progress.
The cutscene is narrative strategy context; hub economy remains owned by the hub menu/runtime systems.
Animals have no dialogue.
Density cap must protect performance.

events.sourceRationale: Debt/rent payment is required to make the final battle prerequisites reachable.
noParadoxChecks: Debt clearing must require enough EC in runtime logic before setting success.
Failure keeps payment retry available without softlock.

events.sourceRationale: Aggregate recruitment flag is required so final unlock logic has a single testable prerequisite.
noParadoxChecks: Aggregate flag must be recomputed or invalidated only by explicit future design; recruited states are monotonic in current plan.

events.sourceRationale: Runtime counts recruited PGs and sets progress.minimum_3_recruited before the core chain; this manifest entry documents and validates that aggregate prerequisite without requiring all 8 recruitments.
noParadoxChecks: The aggregate is computed from real recruited flags by runtime, not granted directly by this checker.
Three recruited PGs unlock final eligibility checks, while recruiting all 8 remains valid optional completion depth.

events.sourceRationale: Final battle availability bridges at least 3 recruitments, daily debt, 500 EC administrative tax, and night-window prerequisites for both event and dialogue.
noParadoxChecks: Final unlock must not start the battle automatically.
The 500 EC administrative tax must be paid by explicit player interaction, never by the natural core-chain checker.
Missing prerequisites produce readable feedback instead of a softlock.
